data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Alzamend Neuro Partners with QMENTA To Advance AI-Powered Imaging For Is Phase 2 Trial Of Lead Program
data.description: Alzamend Neuro teams up with QMENTA for five AL001 Phase 2 trials at Mass General, targeting Alzheimer's, PTSD, bipolar disorder, and more.

data.title: Elon Musk's Mars Ambitions Take Flight As SpaceX Gets FAA Approval For Texas Starship Launches
data.description: SpaceX gets FAA approval to increase Starship launches from 5 to 25 in Texas, as Elon Musk's plans to travel to Mars get a boost.

data.title: Litecoin Beats Bitcoin, Ethereum To Top Crypto Gainers List—Open Interest Hits A Two-Month High
data.description: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) led the cryptocurrency market gainers list on Tuesday, as the broader market rallied on hopeful trade deal developments.

data.title: Bitcoin Reserve Bill Signed Into Law By New Hampshire Governor: Granite State Move Makes It A Pioneer
data.description: New Hampshire became the first U.S. state to establish a Strategic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) Reserve on Tuesday, allowing public funds to be invested in the apex cryptocurrency and other digital assets.

data.title: AMD Always Expected Restrictions On Cutting Edge GPU Exports To China, Says Lisa Su — Working With Trump Administration To Keep US AI Tech Dominant
data.description: AMD CEO Lisa Su says while China's chip restrictions were already expected, AMD's bigger focus is navigating new U.S. AI rules to secure its global market leadership.
